remarks: Convenience, serenity & exceptional value come together at 59 Creeping Hemlock Drive, a beautifully maintained home w/ in ground pool on a quiet street in Norwalk's desirable Cranbury neighborhood. Major investments include a new roof, new high efficiency heating & cooling systems, conversion from oil to propane, updated mechanicals, enhanced air filtration, a new hot water system & smart thermostat technology. These costly improvements are already complete, making this home an exceptional opportunity at a tremendous value. Filled with natural sunlight, this bright & inviting home offers 4 bedrooms & 3 full baths, including newly renovated bathrooms & a finished lower level that provides flexible space for recreation, guests, a home office or gym. This lower level walks out to a large patio and sparkling pool with new marble coping, a new pool pump motor and new pool heater. Hardwood floors flow throughout the main living areas, with new hardwood in primary bedroom & living room, complemented by timeless finishes and a warm, welcoming feel. The dining room with fireplace creates a beautiful gathering space and flows effortlessly into both the kitchen & family room, creating a layout that lives comfortably and is ideal for entertaining. The kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances & abundant cabinetry.. Moments from shopping, restaurants, parks, golf courses, Route 7 & the Merritt Parkway, this location offers easy access to everything Norwalk Offers!
